description: Seat Unique is a premium ticketing and hospitality marketplace for live sport, music, and cultural events. It also provides enterprise distribution and white-label technology for partners selling premium event inventory.
summary: Seat Unique publicly exposes a known unauthenticated MCP server at `https://chatgpt-app.seatunique.com/mcp`; Seat Unique’s public site also mentions partner/trade API integrations, but no public API documentation, schema/spec, CLI, or GraphQL surface could be verified on the domain.
